div.div:
Total: 3 requests
instead of 1 graphQL request
(500-700ms latency here instead of 100ms latency in graphQL)

div.div: 1 request response provides only a few information, not all required info. So, it is called under-fetching. For getting all info, we need to make 3 requests here.
